requiredDecisions.decision: whether a natal star in an annual palace contributes
requiredDecisions.v08Position: Yes — natal-layer stars physically present in an annual-configured palace contribute at the same point-class weight as any other allowed layer for that rule (allowedTemporalLayers includes 'natal' for most staticPositive/staticNegative rules).
requiredDecisions.v09Note: Preserved as-is per task instruction (no source-backed alternative found). This audit measured its consequence: natal-layer contribution is the larger, positive-leaning, year-invariant component that anchors intra-year spread (see audit-findings.md Finding 2). Any V0.9 change here is a point-policy/temporal-identity candidate, not something this pack recommends outright.

requiredDecisions.decision: whether annual Tứ Hóa is a distinct star identity
requiredDecisions.v08Position: Yes — Lưu Hóa {Lộc,Quyền,Khoa,Kỵ} are exact, temporally distinct identities from natal/decadal Hóa {...}; matching requires exact name + allowedTemporalLayers.
requiredDecisions.v09Note: Preserved as-is; no source-backed alternative found.

requiredDecisions.decision: whether aliases may cross temporal layers
requiredDecisions.v08Position: No — annual-star-aliases.nam-phai.v0.8.json aliases are spelling/naming variants of the exact same temporal identity only; star families (e.g. groups sharing a familyId) are never treated as interchangeable during exact rule matching.
requiredDecisions.v09Note: Preserved as-is; this is a core runtime integrity invariant (v08-integrity.test.ts already asserts it) and this pack found no evidence to challenge it.

requiredDecisions.decision: how source metadata affects layer inference
requiredDecisions.v08Position: resolveTemporalLayer() prefers structured star.source/star.layer metadata (e.g. 'annual', 'natal', 'major') over name-prefix inference; falls back to exactCanonicalStarName + inferTemporalLayerFromCanonicalName only when metadata is absent.
requiredDecisions.v09Note: Preserved as-is; verified directly by reading nam-phai-v08/star-identity.ts.

requiredDecisions.v08Position: Not evaluated in this pack — not found in the current V0.8 star registry, capability catalog, or corpus emissions scan.
requiredDecisions.v09Note: RESEARCH_INCOMPLETE for this specific star; out of the explicitly-requested star list for this task, and this audit found no production reference to it.

requiredDecisions.decision: how bare Thái Tuế differs from Lưu Thái Tuế
requiredDecisions.v08Position: Bare natal Thái Tuế never activates the Lưu Thái Tuế prominence multiplier — isLuuThaiTueInPalace() requires either the authoritative chart.taiTuePalace pointer or an exact 'Lưu Thái Tuế' identity with temporalLayer 'annual'.
requiredDecisions.v09Note: Preserved as-is; verified directly by reading nam-phai-v08/score-domain.ts:isLuuThaiTueInPalace.

preservationStatement: The current exact-matching behavior is preserved unless research produces a source-backed alternative for V0.9. This pack produced no source-backed alternative for any of the six decisions above (only derived audit measurements and low-confidence engineering-hypothesis notes) — none of them changes.
